events.title: Taiwan Semiconductor reaches best available historical close
events.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor reached its best available historical closing price of USD 446.69.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: Taiwan Semiconductor added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Technology leaders are often judged by whether they can keep turning product relevance, platform scale and innovation into durable growth.
